narrative: Phase 1 smoke test complete — mark reconciler smoke test done

Phase 3 of routines rollout. Dry-run prompts/scan-and-check.md against a recent inbox window from a desktop Claude Code session first (Surface A, needs MCP) to tune false-positive patterns. Then register in routines console with cron '23 13,16,19,22 * * 1-5' UTC (= 9:23am / 12:23pm / 3:23pm / 6:23pm EDT weekdays; flip to '23 14,17,20,23 * * 1-5' during EST), model Sonnet, connectors Gmail + Notion + HubSpot.
title: Complete Phase 3 — dry-run and register scan-and-check routine
